# SC Data Filtering and Integration

# Using filter count
Includes data loading, data filtering based on nFeature and percent.mt, doublet filtering, integration, and clustering.

## Data Paths
```{r}

library("Seurat")
library("ggplot2")

setwd("/home/mouse_ad/002SC")

dir.create("004Seurat_out")
outbase <- "004Seurat_out"

# create output directory if not exists.
outdir <- file.path(outbase, "001filter_and_integrate")

if (! file.exists(outdir)){
  dir.create(outdir)
}

# Load data and convert to Seurat objects.

# read data
data.list <- list()

#-----------#
# read data #
#-----------#
data.path <- list(
  WT_ctrl.1 = "000data/batch1/KYSY-7672-221034-01/WT_ctrl/filtered_feature_bc_matrix",
  WT_ctrl.2 = "000data/batch2/KYSY-8399-Cellranger/221034B_WT_ctrl/outs/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/",
  WT_ctrl.3 = "000data/batch3/KYSY-9307-221034-03/result/WT_CTRL/2.Basic_analysis/2.2.filtered_feature_bc_matrix",
  AD_ctrl.1 = "000data/batch1/KYSY-7672-221034-01/AD_ctrl/filtered_feature_bc_matrix",
  AD_ctrl.2 = "000data/batch2/KYSY-8399-Cellranger/221034B_AD_ctrl/outs/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/",
  AD_5622.1 = "000data/batch1/KYSY-7672-221034-01/AD_5622/filtered_feature_bc_matrix",
  AD_5622.2 = "000data/batch2/KYSY-8399-Cellranger/221034B_AD_5622/outs/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/", 
  WT_ctrl.4 = "000data/batch4/KYSY-11001_221034/result/WT_ctrl/2.Basic_analysis/2.2.filtered_feature_bc_matrix/", 
  AD_ctrl.4 = "000data/batch4/KYSY-11001_221034/result/AD_ctrl/2.Basic_analysis/2.2.filtered_feature_bc_matrix/", 
  AD_5622.4 = "000data/batch4/KYSY-11001_221034/result/AD_5622/2.Basic_analysis/2.2.filtered_feature_bc_matrix/"
)
```

## Basic Filtering

### Explore data distribution and determine filtering criteria

```{r}

# dhlab
dir.create("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/raw_meta")

for (sample in names(data.path)) {
  cat("sample: ", sample, "\n")
  sample.path <- data.path[[sample]]
  sample.matrix <- Read10X(data.dir=sample.path)
  sobj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = sample.matrix, 
                          project = sample, 
                          min.cells = 3, 
                          min.features = 200)
  sobj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(sobj, pattern="^mt-")
  write.csv(sobj@meta.data, paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/raw_meta/", sample, ".csv"))
}

meta.list <- list()
for (sample in names(data.path)) {
  df <- read.csv(paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/raw_meta/", sample, ".csv"), row.names=1)
  df$cell_ID <- paste0(df$orig.ident, "-", row.names(df))
  meta.list[[sample]] <- df
}

meta <- Reduce(rbind, meta.list)

write.csv(meta, "004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/raw_meta/raw_meta.merged.csv")

# thinkpad
# workdir: C:/Users/a8799/Desktop/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/PLX5622

meta <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/raw_meta/raw_meta.merged.csv", row.names=1)

library(ggplot2)

meta$orig.ident <- factor(meta$orig.ident, levels=c("WT_ctrl.1", "AD_ctrl.1", "AD_5622.1",
                                                    "WT_ctrl.2", "AD_ctrl.2", "AD_5622.2", 
                                                    "WT_ctrl.4", "AD_ctrl.4", "AD_5622.4",
                                                    "WT_ctrl.3"), ordered=T)

# nCount_RNA
ggplot(meta, aes(orig.ident, nCount_RNA)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 30000))
# Some sample medians reach 15,000

ggplot(meta, aes(x=nCount_RNA)) + 
         geom_density() + coord_cartesian(xlim=c(0, 30000)) + 
  facet_wrap(.~orig.ident, ncol=3)
# nCount_RNA has obvious bimodal distribution. Unsure if due to doublets or different cell types.
# Density curves vary significantly between batches.
       
# nFeature_RNA
ggplot(meta, aes(orig.ident, nFeature_RNA)) + geom_boxplot()
# Median peaks around 5,000

ggplot(meta, aes(orig.ident, nFeature_RNA)) + 
  geom_boxplot() + coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 2000)) # Look at lower bound

ggplot(meta, aes(x=nFeature_RNA)) + 
         geom_density() + coord_cartesian(xlim=c(0, 10000)) + 
  facet_wrap(.~orig.ident, ncol=3)
# Clear bimodal distribution. 8,000 seems appropriate.


# percent.mt < 1 for the vast majority of cells. Setting a 5% threshold is appropriate.
# p1 <- ggplot(meta, aes(orig.ident, percent.mt)) + geom_boxplot()
ggplot(meta, aes(orig.ident, percent.mt)) + geom_boxplot() + coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0, 5))

# Is mitochondrial proportion unimodal?
ggplot(subset(meta, orig.ident == "WT_ctrl.1"), aes(y=percent.mt)) + geom_histogram()

ggplot(meta, aes(x=percent.mt)) + geom_density() + xlim(c(0, 1))

table(meta$percent.mt < 3) # 66 items

table(meta$nFeature_RNA < 8000) # 750 items

# Determine criteria:
nFeature_RNA.cutoff > 500
nFeature_RNA.cutoff < 8000
percent.mt.cutoff <- 3
```

### Perform Filtering

```{r}

dir.create("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/naive_filter")

for (sample in names(data.path)) {
  cat("sample: ", sample, "\n")
  sample.path <- data.path[[sample]]
  sample.matrix <- Read10X(data.dir=sample.path)
  sobj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = sample.matrix, 
                          project = sample, 
                          min.cells = 3, 
                          min.features = 200)
  sobj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(sobj, pattern="^mt-")
  sobj.sub <- subset(sobj, subset = nFeature_RNA > 500 & 
                nFeature_RNA < 8000 & 
                percent.mt  < 3)
  saveRDS(sobj.sub, paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/naive_filter/", sample, ".rds"))
}

```


## Remove Ambient RNA

```{r}
# BiocManager::install("decontX") # Failed
# remotes::install_github("campbio/decontX") # Failed

# Use the environment from the previous adp1 project.
# conda activate decontX

setwd("/storage/lch/project/2022-10-14_mouse_spatial/002SC")

library(decontX)
library(Seurat) # v5 in this environment.

dir.create("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx")

samples <- c("WT_ctrl.1","WT_ctrl.2","WT_ctrl.3","AD_ctrl.1","AD_ctrl.2",
             "AD_5622.1","AD_5622.2","WT_ctrl.4","AD_ctrl.4","AD_5622.4")

for (sample in samples) {
  cat("sample: ", sample, "\n")
  sobj <- readRDS(paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/naive_filter/", sample, ".rds"))
  # Checked, format is correct.
  d1 <- decontX(sobj@assays$RNA@counts)
  saveRDS(d1, paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/", sample, ".rds"))
}

```

### Statistics of Ambient RNA

```{r}
# dhlab
sobj.meta <- read.csv("002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.meta.csv", row.names=1)

contamination.all <- c()
for (sample.name in unique(sobj.meta$orig.ident)) {
  cat(sample.name, "\n")
  sobj.1 <- readRDS(paste0("002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/", sample.name, ".rds"))
  contamination <- sobj.1$estimates$all_cells$contamination
  names(contamination) <- paste0(sample.name, "_", names(contamination))
  contamination.all <- c(contamination.all, contamination)
}

sobj.meta$ambientRNA <- contamination.all[row.names(sobj.meta)]

write.csv(sobj.meta, "002SC/004Seurat_out/002cell_type_anno/sobj.meta.ambient.csv")
```


### Statistics of Genes Constituting Ambient RNA

```{r}

# dhlab
samples <- c("WT_ctrl.1","WT_ctrl.2","WT_ctrl.3","AD_ctrl.1","AD_ctrl.2",
             "AD_5622.1","AD_5622.2","WT_ctrl.4","AD_ctrl.4","AD_5622.4")

collector <- list()
for (sample in samples) {
  cat("sample: ", sample, "\n")
  sobj <- readRDS(paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/naive_filter/", sample, ".rds"))
  result <- readRDS(paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/", sample, ".rds"))
  
  ambient.count <- sobj@assays$RNA@counts - result$decontXcounts
  ambient.count.rowSums <- rowSums(ambient.count)
  collector[[sample]] <- ambient.count.rowSums
}

# Use Reduce and merge for cyclic merging

for (s in names(collector)) {
  vec <- collector[[s]]
  df <- data.frame(gene=names(vec), count=vec)
  names(df) <- c("gene", s)
  collector[[s]] <- df
}

df2 <- Reduce(function(x, y) {merge(x, y, by="gene", all=T)}, collector)
df2[is.na(df2)] <- 0

row.names(df2) <- df2$gene
df2$gene <- NULL

write.csv(df2, "004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/ambient_count.csv")

# thinkpad
ambient_count <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/ambient_count.csv", row.names=1)

boxplot(ambient_count)

ambient.genes.list <- list()
for (s in colnames(ambient_count)) {
  x <- boxplot(ambient_count[[s]])
  ambient.genes <- row.names(ambient_count)[ambient_count[[s]] > x$stats[5, 1]]
  ambient.genes.list[[s]] <- ambient.genes
}

lapply(ambient.genes.list, length)

length(Reduce(intersect, ambient.genes.list)) # [1] 2352
length(unique(unlist(ambient.genes.list))) # [1] 3760

ambient.genes <- unique(unlist(ambient.genes.list))

writeLines(ambient.genes, "../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/ambient.genes.list")

# Top 5 ambient genes for each sample:
genes <- row.names(ambient_count)
for (s in samples) {
  top5 <- head(genes[order(ambient_count[[s]], decreasing = T)], 5)
  cat(s, ": ", top5, "\n")
}

ambient_count.rowSums <- sort(rowSums(ambient_count), decreasing = T)

head(ambient_count.rowSums, 20)

# Gene set accounting for 95% of ambient source:
ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum <- cumsum(ambient_count.rowSums) / sum(ambient_count.rowSums)

length(ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum[ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum < 0.5]) # 684

  # Mitochondrial RNA has little effect on ambient RNA. Neuronal genes are mainly affected.
ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum[grepl("^mt-", names(ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum))]
#    mt-Co3    mt-Co1   mt-Atp6    mt-Co2   mt-Cytb    mt-Nd2    mt-Nd4    mt-Nd1    mt-Nd5    mt-Nd3   mt-Nd4l   mt-Atp8    mt-Nd6 
# 0.8009375 0.8554724 0.8720010 0.8764466 0.9132079 0.9445560 0.9487192 0.9504872 0.9898348 0.9918414 0.9963237 0.9983611 0.9991917 

ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum[grepl("^Ndufs", names(ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum))]
#    Ndufs4    Ndufs1    Ndufs3    Ndufs2    Ndufs5    Ndufs7    Ndufs8    Ndufs6 
# 0.6703147 0.7572406 0.8650144 0.9243524 0.9247903 0.9301441 0.9758531 0.9870930

df <- data.frame(gene=names(ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum), cum_ratio=ambient_count.rowSums.cumsum)
df$rank <- 1:nrow(df)

write.csv(df, "../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/gene.rank_by_ambient.csv")

df.sub <- subset(df, grepl("^mt-", df$gene))

library(ggrepel)

ggplot(df, aes(rank, cum_ratio)) + geom_line(aes(group=1)) + 
  labs(x="rank of genes (order by ambient count)", y="Cumulative ratio") + 
  geom_point(data=df.sub) + 
  # geom_text(data=df.sub, aes(label=gene)) + 
  geom_text_repel(data=df.sub, aes(label=gene)) + 
  theme(axis.text.x=element_blank())

```


## Remove doublets: doubletFinder

```{r}

library("DoubletFinder")
library("dplyr")

data.list <- list()
for (sample in names(data.path)) {
  d <- readRDS(paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/", sample, ".rds"))
  sobj <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = d$decontXcounts, 
                          project = sample, 
                          min.cells = 3, 
                          min.features = 200)
  data.list[[sample]] <- sobj
}


data.list <- lapply(data.list, function(x){
    NormalizeData(x) %>% FindVariableFeatures() %>%
    ScaleData() %>% RunPCA() %>% JackStraw() %>%
    ScoreJackStraw()
})

# Temporarily manually select a PC value, adjust later if time permits.
picked.dim <- 30

# clusters help with homotypic doublets, UMAP helps with plotting.
data.list <- lapply(data.list, function(x){
  FindNeighbors(x, dims = 1:picked.dim) %>%
  FindClusters(.,resolution = 0.3) %>%
  RunUMAP(., dims = 1:picked.dim)
})

for (i in names(data.list)){
  x <- data.list[[i]]
  
  ## Estimate pK (no ground-truth)           
  sweep.x <- paramSweep_v3(x, PCs = 1:10, sct = FALSE)
  sweep.stats_x <- summarizeSweep(sweep.x, GT = FALSE)
  bcmvn_x <- find.pK(sweep.stats_x)
  # Select pK that maximizes BCmetric, ref: https://rpubs.com/kenneditodd/doublet_finder_example
  bcmvn.max <- bcmvn_x[which.max(bcmvn_x$BCmetric),]
  optimal.pk <- bcmvn.max$pK
  optimal.pk <- as.numeric(levels(optimal.pk))[optimal.pk]
  
  # Estimate nExp.poi.adj
  annotations <- x@meta.data$seurat_clusters
  homotypic.prop <- modelHomotypic(annotations) 
  nExp.poi <- round(optimal.pk * nrow(x@meta.data)) 
  ## Assuming 7.5% doublet formation rate - tailor for your dataset
  nExp.poi.adj <- round(nExp.poi * (1 - homotypic.prop))
  
  x <- doubletFinder_v3(x, PCs = 1:picked.dim, pN = 0.25,
                pK = optimal.pk, nExp = nExp.poi.adj, 
                reuse.pANN = FALSE, sct = FALSE)
  
  DF.name <- paste0("DF.classifications_0.25_", optimal.pk, "_", nExp.poi.adj)
  
  # Statistics results
  outdir.doublet <- file.path(outdir, "doublet")
  if (!file.exists(outdir.doublet)) dir.create(outdir.doublet)
  write.csv(x@meta.data, file.path(outdir.doublet, paste0("doublet.", i, ".csv")))
  
  # Select singlets
  x = x[, x@meta.data[, DF.name] == "Singlet"] ##Extract all singlet
  data.list[[i]] <- x
}

saveRDS(data.list, "004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/sobj.list.rds")


```

## Statistics of Filtering Results

Statistical indicators:
1. Basic filtering: cell count.
2. Ambient RNA: average ambient RNA proportion.
3. Doublet: cell count.

```{r}
# env: dhlab

# 0. Raw data volume
meta <- read.csv("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/raw_meta/raw_meta.merged.csv", row.names=1)
df <- table(meta$orig.ident)
raw_count <- df[names(data.list)]

# AD_5622.1 AD_5622.2 AD_5622.4 AD_ctrl.1 AD_ctrl.2 AD_ctrl.4 WT_ctrl.1 WT_ctrl.2 WT_ctrl.3 WT_ctrl.4 
#      2450      4834      3287      2638      5671     11690      2436      1594      8034      5101

# 1. Basic filtering
ncell.after_naive <- c()
ambient.ratio <- c()

for (sample in names(data.list)) {
  sobj <- readRDS(paste0("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/decontx/", sample, ".rds"))
  ncell.after_naive[sample] <- ncol(sobj$decontXcounts)
  ambient.ratio[sample] <- mean(sobj$contamination) # 2. ambient RNA
}

# 3. Doublet
ncell.after_doublet <- sapply(data.list, ncol)[names(data.list)]

df.quality_control <- cbind(raw_count, ncell.after_naive, ambient.ratio, ncell.after_doublet)

write.csv(df.quality_control, "004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/df.quality_control.csv")
```


## Integration and Clustering

```{r}
samples <- names(data.list)

data.list <- lapply(samples, function(x){
  x <- data.list[[x]]
  x@meta.data <- x@meta.data[, c("orig.ident","nCount_RNA", "nFeature_RNA")]
  return(x)
  })

names(data.list) <- samples

data.merged <- merge(data.list[[1]], y = c(data.list[[2]], data.list[[3]], data.list[[4]],
                                           data.list[[5]], data.list[[6]], data.list[[7]], 
                                           data.list[[8]], data.list[[9]], data.list[[10]]),
                     add.cell.ids = samples, project = "PLX5622")

data.merged <- FindVariableFeatures(data.merged, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)

data.merged <- ScaleData(data.merged, verbose = FALSE) %>%
                   RunPCA(npcs=30) %>% RunUMAP(dims=1:30) %>%
                   FindNeighbors(dims=1:30)

data.merged$treatment <- sapply(strsplit(as.character(data.merged$orig.ident), ".", fixed = T), "[", 1)
data.merged$batch <- sapply(strsplit(as.character(data.merged$orig.ident), ".", fixed = T), "[", 2)

library(harmony)

data.merged <- RunHarmony(data.merged, group.by.vars=c("orig.ident"), assay.use = "RNA") # If "batch" is added, batch will be ignored.

data.merged <- RunUMAP(data.merged, dims=1:30, reduction="harmony")

data.merged <- FindNeighbors(data.merged, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:30)
data.merged <- FindClusters(data.merged, resolution = 0.3)

saveRDS(data.merged, "004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/sobj.rds")

data.merged@meta.data <- cbind(data.merged@meta.data, data.merged@reductions$umap@cell.embeddings)

write.csv(data.merged@meta.data, "004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/sobj.meta.csv")
```

## plot

### UMAP

```{r}
# thinkpad

library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

sobj.meta <- read.csv("../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/sobj.meta.csv", row.names=1)

sobj.meta$treatment <- factor(sobj.meta$treatment, levels=c("WT_ctrl", "AD_ctrl", "AD_5622"), ordered=T)
sobj.meta$batch <- factor(sobj.meta$batch)
sobj.meta$seurat_clusters <- factor(sobj.meta$seurat_clusters)

p1 <- DimPlot(sobj, reduction = "umap", group.by = "batch", label=T, combine=F)
ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/umap.batch.png", p1, width=10, height=8, dpi=300)

p1 <- DimPlot(sobj, reduction = "umap", group.by = "treatment", label=T, combine=F)
ggsave("../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/umap.treatment.png", p1, width=10, height=8, dpi=300)

p1 <- DimPlot(sobj, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters", label=T, combine=F)
ggsave("004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/umap.cluster.png", p1, width=10, height=8, dpi=300)
```

```{r}
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/umap.batch.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/umap.treatment.png")
knitr::include_graphics("../002SC/004Seurat_out/001filter_and_integrate/umap.cluster.png")
```
